creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat Nov  9 21:47:06 2013
New Revision: 333349
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/333349

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Support STAGEDIR
  - While I'm here, remove leading indefinite article from COMMENT
  
  PR:		ports/183822
  Submitted by:	Rainer Hurling <rhurlin@gwdg.de> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/games/sudoku_solver/Makefile   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/games/sudoku_solver/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/sudoku_solver/Makefile	Sat Nov  9 21:47:01 2013	(r333348)
+++ head/games/sudoku_solver/Makefile	Sat Nov  9 21:47:06 2013	(r333349)
@@ -8,7 +8,9 @@ MASTER_SITES=	http://www.techfinesse.com
 DISTNAME=	solver
 
 MAINTAINER=	rhurlin@gwdg.de
-COMMENT=	A Sudoku Solver in C
+COMMENT=	Sudoku Solver in C
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
 WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${DISTNAME}_${PORTVERSION}
 
@@ -16,12 +18,11 @@ ALL_TARGET=	# empty
 
 PLIST_FILES=	bin/sudoku_solver
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e "s,^CC,#CC, ; s,^CFLAGS,#CFLAGS," \
 		${WRKSRC}/${MAKEFILE}
 
 do-install:
-	@${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/sudoku_solver ${PREFIX}/bin
+	@${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/sudoku_solver ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
